items.title: Taylor Swift's rumoured wedding celebrations begin with star-studded New York event
items.dek: Actress Lena Dunham, model Gigi Hadid and longtime music collaborator Jack Antonoff were spotted in formal attire near Madison Square Garden.
items.body: Actress Lena Dunham, model Gigi Hadid and longtime music collaborator Jack Antonoff were spotted in formal attire near Madison Square Garden.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
items.dek: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.
items.body: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Instagram running ads promoting child sexual abuse material in India, BBC finds
items.dek: The ads use terms including “rape” and “child video” and link to content on the messaging app Telegram.
items.body: The ads use terms including “rape” and “child video” and link to content on the messaging app Telegram.
items.author: IriLine Desk
